title: Cozy Craft
description: Cozy Craft inspired by Spark's Realism Craft on Bedrock.
body:
After the release of Realism Craft I wanted to make a similar mod pack for some Java.

My priority was to make a lightweight modpack that would work on most systems and at the same time look nice, and I think I did that.

I think it can be played comfortably even with 2gb ram.
4gb+ is required to play with shader.

Since the 1.21 patch just came out, some mods are still outdated. That's why I couldn't add a few mods I had in mind. I will add them when they are updated in the future.

I looked at a lot of mods to make it look like Realism Craft, but don't forget to write in the comments if you have mods that you think would be even better.

Some of the mods are

- Shoulder Surfing Reloaded
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Structory
- Terralith
- Handcrafted
- Essential (You can play with your friends :) )

And most importantly
- Fresh Animations
- Fresh Moves
- Whimscape
- +Whimscape Leaves (will be added when upgraded to 1.21)
- +Whimscape Fresh Animation (will be added when upgraded to 1.21)

 

And pictures from the Mod package;
